name: Cherry Yogurt Bread for Bread Machine
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure 1/2 cup water and place in the bread machine pan.
2. Add 2 cups white bread flour to the pan.
3. Add 2 tbsp unsweetened applesauce to the pan.
4. Add 1 1/2 tsp salt to the pan.
5. Add 1 1/2 cups cherry yogurt, low fat, to the pan.
6. If using dried cherries, add them now (optional).
7. Select regular loaf setting and press start.
For a large loaf:
1. Measure 3/4 cup water and place in the bread machine pan.
2. Add 1 cup white bread flour to the pan.
3. Add 2 tbsp unsweetened applesauce to the pan.
4. Add 1 tsp salt to the pan.
5. Add 1 1/2 cups cherry yogurt, low fat, to the pan.
6. If using dried cherries, add them now (optional).
7. Select large loaf setting and press start.
HINTS:
- Use low-fat fruit-flavored yogurt.
- Add dry cherries whole if desired.
- Whole cherries can be added at the beep of the fruit/nut cycle.
- This recipe works with regular and rapid bake cycles.
- Nutrition facts: 130 calories, 12% protein, 0.3 mg cholesterol, 86% carbs, 172 mg sodium, 2% fat.
